sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q²M Bathe+

Product Images:
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-bathe-plus-all-1548x1430_1548x1430.webp?v=1769863872
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-bathe-plus-4l_1548x1548.jpg?v=1769863876
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-bathe-plus-1000ml_1548x1548.jpg?v=1769863877
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-bathe-plus-500ml_1548x1548.jpg?v=1769863879
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-q2m-bathe-plus-a-1548x1430_1548x1430.webp?v=1769863880
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-q2m-bathe-plus-b-1548x1430_1548x1430.webp?v=1769863882
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-bathe-plus-c-1548x1430_1548x1430.webp?v=1769863883

We Say:
Very few car care products ever stop us in our tracks and make us laugh out loud, but Gyeon Q²M Bathe+ did the first time we used it; the beading it imparts is quite frankly ridiculous! Whereas wash and wax shampoos rarely work well, Gyeon have absolutely nailed what is effectively their synthetic equivalent. As a result of being fortified with SiO2-rich polymers, Gyeon Q²M Bathe+ not only does everything that Gyeon Q²M Bathe does, but also lays down a temporary hydrophobic coating that enhances surface gloss and strongly repels water and grime for up to several weeks at a time. This self-cleaning behaviour is noticeable all year round, but is particularly welcome during the winter months when road salt and grime make a mess of our roads.

Key Features:
Cleaning Strength: 7/10 (Compared To Others)
Recommended Dosage: 40 ml (In A PB Clear Wash Bucket)
Sudsiness: 7/10 (Compared To Others)

Description:
Gyeon Q²M Bathe+ is an innovative pH neutral shampoo fortified with SiO2. By depositing a very slick layer of SiO2-rich polymers, Gyeon Q²M Bathe+ not only cleans gently and rinses freely, but also enhances surface gloss and hydrophobicity. The latter effect is the most pronounced, not only in terms of the sudden dramatic improvement in water beading it causes, but also it terms of the self-cleaning properties it imparts (by actively repelling rainfall and road spray, more dirt and grime is carried away instead of being allowed to accumulate in situ). Consequently, Gyeon Q²M Bathe+ makes routine maintenance much quicker and easier, as the interval between washes can be comfortably extended, and the need for quick detailing is eliminated.

Specification:
Adds Protection: Yes
Chemical Basis: Detergent-based
Cleaning Strength: 7
Enhances Gloss: Yes
Lubricity: 8
Number Of Washes Per Bottle: 10 (400 ml) | 25 (1 L)
Recommended Dilution Ratio: 500:1 (water:product)
Recommended Dosage: 40 ml (in a PB Clear Wash Bucket)
Strips Coatings: No
Strips Sealants And Waxes: No
Sudsiness: 7
pH: 7 (neutral)

How To Use:
For best results use at a dilution rate of 500:1 (water:product), which equates to 40 ml in a PB Clear Wash Bucket. Simply add the correct amount of shampoo to your suds bucket and then fill it to the top with warm water, stirring it as it fills. If your water pressure is low and relatively few suds are produced, blast a little cold water into the bucket with your hose or pressure washer (submerging the nozzle first); this will generate more suds. The Gyeon Smoothie wash mitt is ideal for use with Gyeon Bathe+.

Q²M Bathe+

$25.99 $22.99

Sizes: 500ml, 1000ml, 4000ml

Wash and protect in one step with Q²M Bathe+. Q²M Bathe+ is the world's first wash shampoo containing SiO2 to not only clean your vehicle effectively but add instant gloss and hydrophobic properties. To keep your finish repelling dirt and debris at the maximum level Q²M Bathe+ SiO2 car wash soap is the solution.

Product Images:
- https://i.shgcdn.com/24fbe6bd-7bbb-4b74-96f5-0730cb8130c2/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/
- https://i.shgcdn.com/4c6d398d-9c6b-44e4-b4d6-b58e03f2cb95/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/

SAFE AND EASY TO USE:
Q²M Bathe+ is perfectly safe on all surfaces including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to bare surfaces or boost the base quartz coating you already have on these surfaces. This SiO2 car wash soap can also be used over existing natural waxes or sealants improving their durability and gloss.

SIO2 INFUSION:
The active SIO2 ingredient adds real protection that you can see every time you wash, unlike many so called wash and wax shampoos, you are left with added hydrophobicity and self-cleaning ability that keeps your car actively cleaner for longer.

PRO TIP:
There are 3 ways of using Q²M Bathe+. Dilute it and use as a regular shampoo with hydrophobic properties, spray on the car with a foam lance or simply spread it on the wet, clean paintwork with a microfiber wash mitt.
TIP: Always work on cool paint, never in direct sunlight. Work in sections and never let the product dry.

CONSUMPTION: 15-20ml/car
PH LEVEL: 6
SIO2 PERCENTAGE: <5%
DURABILITY: up to 8 weeks

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q²M Bathe Plus Ceramic Shampoo — Gold Label Car Care and Detailing Supplies
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q²M Bathe Plus Ceramic Shampoo

by Gyeon

Original price: £22.00 - £116.00
Current price: £22.00

Sizes: 500ml - £22.00, 1L - £33.00, 4L - £116.00

Product Images:
- https://www.goldlabelcarcare.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q_M_Bathe_Plus_Ceramic_Shampoo_Both_724x700.png?v=1743609515
- https://www.goldlabelcarcare.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q_M_Bathe_Plus_Ceramic_Shampoo_500ml_700x700.webp?v=1743609533
- https://www.goldlabelcarcare.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q_M_Bathe_Plus_Ceramic_Shampoo_1L_700x700.webp?v=1743609540
- https://www.goldlabelcarcare.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q_M_Bathe_Plus_Ceramic_Shampoo_4L_320x320.webp?v=1743609552
- https://www.goldlabelcarcare.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q_M_Bathe_Plus_Ceramic_Shampoo_Lifestyle_467x700.jpg?v=1743609564

Description:
Q2M Bathe+ is the world's first pH neutral shampoo containing SiO2. Even a quick wash leaves a strong hydrophobic layer, repelling water, dirt and prolonging the need for a next wash.

Bathe+ is a shampoo that leaves a hydrophobic layer behind. It shares properties from Q2M WetCoat, but in a shampoo form. Use as normal in your wash bucket, or use in a snow foam lance after your final rinse to add a hydrophobic layer to your entire car.

EFFICIENT:
Only 15-20ml of Bathe+ diluted in ca. 12 litres of water is enough to both cleanse the bodywork of your vehicle and leave a smooth, self cleaning and hydrophobic layer.

EASY TO USE/TIME SAVING:
When it comes to all-in-one products, Q2M Bathe+ can be claimed to be revolutionary! Just a quick wash is enough to obtain a marvellous hydrophobic effect and easy maintenance for the next couple of weeks. It is a phenomenal solution for the wintertime, when washing gets harder and the boost in self-cleaning abilities improves the comfort of vehicle maintenance.

1ST EVER SIO2 SHAMPOO:
Q2M Bathe+ is the world's first pH neutral shampoo containing SiO2. Even a quick wash leaves a strong hydrophobic layer, repelling water, dirt and prolonging the need for a next wash. The wash itself is a real joy, while the shampoo is very slick and has a scent characteristic of the whole Gyeon range.

SAFE ON PAINT, GLASS & RIMS:
Q2M BATHE+ is perfectly safe on all surfaces including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to bare surfaces or boost the base quartz coating you already have on these surfaces. It can also be used over existing natural waxes or sealants improving their durability and gloss. And the real proof is when you rinse off the car - you can see the added protection with water beading off for yourself!

ADDED SELF CLEANING:
The active SIO2 ingredient adds real protection that you can see every time you wash, unlike many so called 'wash and wax' shampoos, you are left with added hydrophobicity and self-cleaning ability that keeps your car actively cleaner for longer. However this amazing car wash is pH-neutral and therefore delicate finishes such as nickel / chrome plated or highly polished elements remain pristine.

ADVICE ON APPLICATION:
- Can be used in your wash bucket or after your final rinse via a foam lance to achieve an instant hydrophobic layer.
- Always wash your car's paint with a Q2M Mitt or Woolie Mitt in order to prevent scratches or swirl marks.

PRECAUTIONS:
- Keep out of reach of children.
- Seek medical attention if swallowed.
